message:
feat(app): add hashline_edit tool description and guideline to system prompt

The hashline_edit tool was added to the default tool set but the system
prompt didn't describe it to the model. Add tool description, grep's
hashline=true mention, and a workflow guideline for using LINE#HASH tags
with hashline_edit. Also fix clippy too_many_lines in openai provider
and trailing whitespace in migrations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
